info.description: Lightweight data asset platform with Token-based authentication and AI assistant
info.title: Cornerstone API

post.description: Send a message to the AI assistant and get a reply. The assistant can query and manage data using available tools.

get.description: Returns all databases accessible to the authenticated token.

post.description: Create a new database owned by the authenticated token.
Atomically create a database together with nested tables and fields in a single request.
post.summary: Create database with tables and fields

get.description: Get database details by ID.
Returns all tables in the specified database.

post.description: Create a new field in a table. Valid types: string, text, number, boolean, date, datetime, attachment, select, list, multiselect, single_select, multi_select

get.description: Get field details by ID.

put.description: Update field properties. Valid types: string, text, number, boolean, date, datetime, attachment, select, list, multiselect, single_select, multi_select

post.description: Upload a file attachment. At least one of record_id or field_id is required.

get.description: Get file metadata by ID.
Download the actual file content by ID.
Liveness probe. Returns 200 if the process is running. Does not check external dependencies.
Opens a Server-Sent Events stream for receiving MCP notifications. Requires Accept: text/event-stream header and authentication.

post.description: Streamable HTTP MCP protocol endpoint. Accepts JSON-RPC requests and can respond with JSON or SSE stream. Requires authentication.
Execute a full Query DSL request. Supports from, select, where, order_by, limit, offset, group_by, having, aggregates, join, and union.
Execute multiple named queries in a single request.
Returns the generated SQL and parameters for a query without executing it. Useful for debugging.

get.description: Returns the allowed fields for a queryable table.

parameters.description: Table name (records, tables, databases, fields, files, tokens)
parameters.name: table

get.description: Query records using simple URL parameters instead of full DSL.
Returns all tables the authenticated token can query.

post.description: Validate a query DSL and check access permissions without executing it.

get.description: Readiness probe. Returns 200 if the process is running and the database is reachable. Returns 503 otherwise.
Query records from a table with pagination and filtering.

post.description: Create a new record in a table.
Create multiple identical records in one request (1-100 records).

get.description: Export records from a table as CSV or JSON file.
Get a single record by ID.

put.description: Update record data. Supports optimistic locking via version field.

get.description: Returns all files attached to a record.

post.description: Create a new table inside a database.

get.description: Get table details by ID.
Returns all fields in the specified table.
Get field-level permission settings for a table.

post.description: Set permission for a specific field in a table.

put.description: Set permissions for multiple fields in a table at once.

get.description: Returns all tokens visible to the current token. Master tokens see everything; client tokens see only themselves.

post.description: Create a new API token. Requires Master Token. The token value is returned only once and cannot be retrieved again.

put.description: Update token scopes and/or expiration. Requires Master Token.

delete.description: Delete a token by ID. Requires Master Token to delete tokens other than your own.

ApiKeyAuth.description: Enter your API token (Master Token or client token)
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
